title: Vanilla Scythes : Default Edition
description: Sharpen your skills with Vanilla Scythes — a sleek, low-lag PvP texture pack built for clarity, speed, and domination
body:
# Vanilla Scythes
Vanilla Rework with Improved, smoother textures and most importantly, SCYTHES !

## What does it have?
This pack Features simple yet cool and smooth redesigns for core items of every PVP gamemode

[Join the Discord](https://discord.gg/2P4txSFXva)

[My Ko-Fi](https://ko-fi.com/vastlysucksalot)
